full_text:
Tumor tissue was divided into 3 different parts to evaluate the difference between immune cell composition after 1) dispase II 2) collagenase & hyaluronidase, and 3) mechanical dissociation. Dissociated cells were stained for Day 0 immune cell flow pane

C&H and mechanical dissociations were done as follows:

- ~ 0.5 cm tissue piece was taken separately for C&H and mechanical dissociation

- tissues were mince minced and transferred to 5ml of advanced DMEM-F12 (accidentally this medium was taken instead of Adf+++) containing 50U/ml DNAase and 1x C&H or 50U/ml DNAase for mechanical dissociation.

- Mechanical dissociation was performed in gentleMACS™ C Tubes burrowed from Eliisa Kerkäläinen lab. The C tube was placed in Gentle MACS dissociator at Emmy Verschuren’s lab at FiMM. First spleen 02 (10sec) program was used 4 times followed by spleen 01 (56 sec). The tube was transferred to 370c shaker for 20 min.

- Tube containing C&H was transferred to 370c shaker same as Dispase and incubated for 1hr

- Remaining steps are same as in Dispase dissociation in 15 ml of AdF++ containing 300 ml of Dispase, 150 ml of DNAase.

3) Dispase II dissociated cells were embedded in omegel and BME +/- cytokines in order to evaluate the effect of different matrices and add-ons to immune cell composition and survival

Final pellet was resuspended in 1mL of advanced DMEM-F12

Dispase dissociated cells:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 9.5 E6

live: 5.8 E6

viability: 61.3 %

size: 9 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 8.3 E6

live: 4.3 E6

viability: 56 %

size: 8.3 um

Total cell count: 8.9 e6 / mL

Total volume: 5 mL

C&H dissociated cells:

Cell count /mL 1):

total: 8.6 E6

live: 5.7 E6

viability: 71 %

size: 8 um

Cell count 2):

total: 7.54 E5

live: 5.2 E5

viability: 66.6 %

size: 8 um

Total cell count: 8 e6 / mL

Total volume: 1 mL

Mechanical dissociated cells:

Cell count /mL 1):

total: 2.16 E7

live: 1 E7

viability: 50 %

size: 7.2 um

Cell count 2):

total: 2.2 E7

live: 1.4 E7

viability: 52 %

size: 8 um

Total cell count: 2 e7 / mL

Total volume: 2 mL

A) BME with cells +/- cytokine medium (9x2 drops):

For each 9 drops: 9 wells x 40 µl x = 360 µl

1000 cells/µl = 0.36E6

Volume to take from cell suspension: 315uL

Spin down the cells to remove the medium at 400xg, 6 mins, +4C

Resuspend to:

Medium → 72 µl

BME stock → 288 uL

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium either with or without the cytokines

B) Ome gel with cells +/- cytokine medium (9x2 drops):

For each 9 drops: 9 wells x 40 µl x = 360 µl

1000 cells/µl = 0.36E6

Volume to take from cell suspension: 315uL

Spin down the cells to remove the medium at 400xg, 6 mins, +4C

Resuspend to:

Medium → 299.9 uL

ome-gel → 50.7 µl

aprotinin → 1.1 µl

thrombin → 1.1 µl

fibrinogen → 7.2 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

either with or without the cytokines

C) BME w/o cells +/- cytokine medium (6x2 drops):

For each 6 drops: 6 wells x 40 µl x = 240 µl

Medium → 48 µl

BME stock → 192 uL

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium either with or without the cytokines

D) Ome gel w/o cells +/- cytokine medium (6x2 drops):

For each 6 drops: 6 wells x 40 µl x = 240 µl

Medium → 199.9 uL

ome-gel → 33.8 µl

aprotinin → 0.7 µl

thrombin → 0.7 µl

fibrinogen → 4.8 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

either with or without the cytokines

plate (1): For Flow

Drops plated on 48 well suspension culture plates (CellStar, #677102)

Flow cytometry was performed on final cell pellet of C&H, mechanical dissociated cells and approximately 0.7*E6 dispase dissociated cells for antibody stained

Cells were stained with Immune cell marker panel (first panel) according to the protocol and fixed overnight with 1X diluted BD cell fix (340181). Next day samples were run with new compensation .

-Remaining cells were frozen in stem cell banker 2 vials each dissociation.

Drops were cultured for 6 days

Processing for culture supernatant and flow cytometry

On day 6 supernatant form plate 1 was collected, 3x 500ul tubes for no cell condition. 2x 500 ul tubes for cells with and without cytokines. Supernatant was centrifuged at +4 for 10 min at 1500 rpm and then transferred to new tubes, stored at -80.

Cells cultured in BME and omentumgel +/- cytokine conditions were dissociated with 1U/mL dispase in 300 ul / well AdF+++ medium for 45 min. Drops were pipetted 10 times to make sure they are dissolved. Dissociated matix + cells were collected into 15 ml falcons centrifuged at +4 for 6 min at 400xg.

Supernatant was removed, pellet was resuspended in 900ul of FACS staining buffer, and transferred into 1.5ml eppendorf, centrufuged at +4 for 6 min at 400xg.

Pellet was stained with immune cell antibody panel (same as day 0), and was run on the same day along with new compensation.

Processing for immunofluorescence

Supernatant from plate 2 was removed, drops were washed with 1xPBS (room temperature), and fixed with 300ul/well 4%PFA for 1 hour at room temperature.

Realized later that BME will melt in the presence of PFA! So, all the BME drops had melted at the end of incubation. Only Omentum gel wells were suitable for IF analysis

In the previous experiments, comparison with BME and omentum gel for IF analysis, they were fixed with 10% formalin for 1hr at room temperature, followed by washing with 1xPBS and processing the drops for FFPE analysis. So, for the next sample, we should do the same kind of fixation into FFPE blocks.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

BME (3533-00-02) | | | 0.8
